  • / NAPA Auto Care for Service & Repair

 

Services| Warranty| Offers & Financing| Nearest Repair Shop

Auto Care Service & Repair

Member Log In

There are three main requirements when it comes to dependable auto service and repair: convenience, trust and peace of mind. That’s why 18,000+ NAPA Auto Care centers nationwide are committed to diagnosing a wide range of automotive problems and fixing them right the first time!

And when it comes to vehicle repairs, a little bit of research goes a long way. The NAPA Auto Care Repair Estimator provides a quick, upfront estimate to determine how much an auto repair or routine service should cost on your exact make and model.


Get An Instant Repair Estimate

MOST POPULAR SERVICES

NAPA has set the standard for independently owned neighborhood automotive repair shops and collision centers. Get the dependable vehicle repair services you deserve at your local NAPA Auto Care center.

Why Choose NAPA Auto Care?

ASE-CERTIFIED TECHNICIANS

High-tech vehicles require the latest tools and specialized mechanics. Look for the ASE seal at any NAPA Auto Care center.

Need to maintain your hybrid or electric vehicle? Check out NexDrive.

PEACE OF MIND WARRANTY

Check out the nationwide Peace of Mind Warranty, included FREE to cover parts and labor on qualifying repairs and services for 24 Months / 24,000 Miles.

Contact the local NAPA Auto Care center that completed your original repairs to schedule a warranty-backed service within a 25-mile radius. For warranty-backed service outside a 25-mile radius from your original repair shop, contact the NAPA Auto Care Warranty Administrator at 800-452-NAPA (6272).

NAPA CREDIT CARD

Take advantage of 6 months Promotional Financing on purchases of $199 or more with the NAPA Credit Card at participating locations nationwide.* And, extend your Peace of Mind Warranty coverage to 36 Months / 36,000 Miles, when you use the NAPA Credit Card to pay for repair services.

The NAPA Credit Card offers exclusive cardholder discounts and convenient monthly payments with no annual fee.** The NAPA Credit Card is also accepted at gas stations nationwide*** across all major gas brands.

  • Check If You Prequalify

    • Get a decision in seconds with no impact to your credit score.

See If You Prequalify

  • Ready to Apply?

    • Get started on your application.

Apply Now

  • Already Have The NAPA Credit Card?

    • Manage your NAPA Synchrony Car Care™ Credit Card.

Manage Your Account

*A Promo Fee does not apply to this offer. Qualifying purchase amount must be on one receipt. No interest will be charged on the promo balance if you pay it off, in full, within the promo period. If you do not, interest will be charged on the promo balance from the purchase date. The required minimum monthly payments may or may not pay off the promo balance before the end of the promo period, depending on purchase amount, promo length and payment allocation. Regular account terms apply to non-promo purchases and, after promo period ends, to the promo balance. New Accounts as of July 16, 2024: Purchase APR 34.99%. Penalty APR 39.99%. Min Interest Charge $2. A promo fee will be charged equal to 2% of the amount financed on an equal payment no interest promotion of 18 months or more. Existing cardholders: See your credit card agreement terms. Subject to credit approval. Gas station purchases are not eligible for Promotional Financing. This is a Deferred Interest Promotion. Learn more about how Deferred Interest Promotions work. **For New Accounts: See rates and fees for details. ***Subject to credit approval. Valid everywhere Synchrony Car Care is accepted in the U.S., including Puerto Rico. Click here for merchant locations.
